query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `otp_tokens` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `code` varchar(8) NOT NULL, `type` enum('email_verify','password_reset') NOT NULL, `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL, `used` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `otp_tokens_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
